product.name: Z Bot
product.description: Automated international trading on Z Chain with TRON, Ethereum, and BNB Smart Chain routing.

strategies.name: Oracle Pool Arbitrage
strategies.description: Swap on Z Chain WZ pools when implied pool price deviates from oracle USD reference.

strategies.name: International Routing
strategies.description: Route clone-token liquidity when all public networks and Z settlement bridges are healthy.

strategies.name: Liquidity Rebalance
strategies.description: Rebalance WZ pool inventory toward oracle-weighted targets on Z Chain.

source.notes: Z Bot international trading automation for Z Swap + Z Trade on chain 44002.
